text.en: DENDRAL was one of the first expert systems to show that domain knowledge could make AI practically useful. It helped infer molecular structures from mass-spectrometry evidence by combining search with expert chemical rules. The project shifted attention from general reasoning alone to knowledge-rich systems.
text.zh: DENDRAL 是最早展示领域知识能让 AI 具有实际用途的专家系统之一。它把搜索与专家化学规则结合起来，根据质谱证据推断分子结构。这个项目把注意力从单纯通用推理转向富知识系统。
规则引导的化学结构推断
